user_prompt: so can I copy `libbt.a` from the working one into the packages?
agent_reply: 1. For the missing `esp_hf_client_outgoing_data_ready` symbol, copying a known-good `libbt.a` is valid if it was built from the same ESP-IDF / Arduino libs version, same target `esp32`, same toolchain, and compatible sdkconfig.

2. It will not fix the current custom-package IRAM overflow by itself. Your captured custom package’s `libbt.a` already contains `esp_hf_client_outgoing_data_ready`. The overflow is coming from `esp32/ld/sections.ld`.
If you still want to copy it, copy:
But the more important copy is:
So: copying `libbt.a` is fine as a belt-and-suspenders move, but the linker script is the thing that should make this build pass.
